items.effective_prompt_preview:
[SYSTEM]
You are a high-quality content generation engine. Be clear, concise, and conversion-oriented. Avoid fluff.

[PRODUCT]
Output must be channel-ready and practical. Prioritize readability, scannability, and strong
items.output:
Most content teams don’t have an idea problem — they have an execution problem.
When draft, review, publish, and lead tracking are disconnected, output drops and pipeline suffers.
DemandOrchestrator fixes that loop: one idea in, channel-ready content out, plus clear lead attribution.
If you want the early-access walkthrough, comment "DO" and I’ll send it.

items.effective_prompt_preview:
[SYSTEM]
You are a high-quality content generation engine. Be clear, concise, and conversion-oriented. Avoid fluff.

[PRODUCT]
Output must be channel-ready and practical. Prioritize readability, scannability, and strong
items.output:
Subject: A faster way to publish content that actually converts

Hey — quick note. Most teams don’t struggle with ideas, they struggle with execution.

DemandOrchestrator helps you turn one idea into channel-ready drafts, review quickly, publish safely, and see which posts generate real leads.

If you want, I can send a 5-minute walkthrough and get you early access.

— Jared

items.effective_prompt_preview:
[SYSTEM]
You are a high-quality content generation engine. Be clear, concise, and conversion-oriented. Avoid fluff.

[PRODUCT]
Output must be channel-ready and practical. Prioritize readability, scannability, and strong
items.output: You don’t need a full team to stay consistent — you need a repeatable workflow. Batch 3-5 source ideas weekly, turn them into drafts in one session, and schedule with a built-in review step. That removes daily context switching and keeps output steady.

items.effective_prompt_preview:
[SYSTEM]
You are a high-quality content generation engine. Be clear, concise, and conversion-oriented. Avoid fluff.

[PRODUCT]
Output must be channel-ready and practical. Prioritize readability, scannability, and strong
items.output:
1) Your content strategy isn’t broken — your workflow is.
2) If posting feels chaotic, you don’t need more ideas. You need a system.
3) Most creators lose consistency in execution, not creativity.
4) Stop scheduling noise. Start shipping content that drives pipeline.
5) One idea. Multiple channels. Zero fire drills.

items.effective_prompt_preview:
[SYSTEM]
You are a high-quality content generation engine. Be clear, concise, and conversion-oriented. Avoid fluff.

[PRODUCT]
Output must be channel-ready and practical. Prioritize readability, scannability, and strong
items.output:
[0-3s] Hook: Most creators don’t fail from bad ideas — they fail from messy execution.
[4-10s] Problem: Drafting, reviewing, posting, and tracking live in different tools, so consistency dies.
[11-22s] Solution: DemandOrchestrator turns one idea into publish-ready content, with approvals and retries built in.
[23-30s] CTA: If you want content output without chaos, join early access and I’ll show you the workflow.
